children.heading: .—Establishment Authorized
children.label: a .—Establishment Authorized
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may establish a School of Nursing.

children.heading: .—Degree Granting Authority
children.label: b .—Degree Granting Authority
children.text: The School of Nursing may include a program that awards a bachelor of science in nursing.

children.heading: .—Phased Development
children.label: c .—Phased Development
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may develop the School of Nursing in phases as determined appropriate by the Secretary.
